name: prettier
description: Run Prettier from the command line

name: -c
--check
options.description: Check if your files are formatted

name: -l
--list-different
options.description: Print the names of files that are different from Prettier's formatting

name: -w
--write
options.description: Edit files in-place

name: --arrow-parens
options.description: Include parentheses around a sole arrow function parameter

name: --no-bracket-spacing
options.description: Do not print spaces between brackets

name: --embedded-language-formatting
options.description: Control how Prettier formats quoted code embedded in the file

name: --end-of-line
options.description: Which end of line characters to apply

name: --html-whitespace-sensitivity
options.description: How to handle whitespaces in HTML

name: --jsx-bracket-same-line
options.description: Put > on the last line instead of at a new line

name: --jsx-single-quote
options.description: Use single quotes in JSX

name: --parser
options.description: Which parser to use

name: --print-width
options.description: The line length where Prettier will try wrap

name: --prose-wrap
options.description: How to wrap prose

name: --quote-props
options.description: Change when properties in objects are quoted

name: --no-semi
options.description: Do not print semicolons, except at the beginning of lines which may need them

name: --single-quote
options.description: Use single quotes instead of double quotes

name: --tab-width
options.description: Number of spaces per indentation level

name: --trailing-comma
options.description: Print trailing commas wherever possible when multi-line

name: --use-tabs
options.description: Indent with tabs instead of spaces

name: --vue-indent-script-and-style
options.description: Indent script and style tags in Vue files

name: --config
options.description: Path to a Prettier configuration file (.prettierrc, package.json, prettier.config.js)

name: --no-config
options.description: Do not look for a configuration file

name: --config-precedence
options.description: Define in which order config files and CLI options should be evaluated

name: --no-editorconfig
options.description: Don't take .editorconfig into account when parsing configuration

name: --find-config-path
options.description: Finds a path to the configuration file for the given input file

name: --ignore-path
options.description: Path to a file with patterns describing files to ignore

name: --plugin
options.description: Add a plugin

name: --plugin-search-dir
options.description: Custom directory that contains prettier plugins in node_modules subdirectory

name: --with-node-modules
options.description: Process files inside 'node_modules' directory

name: --cursor-offset
options.description: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting

name: --range-end
options.description: Format code ending at a given character offset (exclusive)

name: --range-start
options.description: Format code starting at a given character offset

name: --no-color
options.description: Do not colorize error messages

name: --file-info
options.description: Extract the following info (as JSON) for a given file path

name: -h
--help
options.description: Show CLI usage, or details about the given flag

name: -u
--ignore-unknown
options.description: Ignore unknown files

name: --insert-pragma
options.description: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment

name: --loglevel
options.description: What level of logs to report

name: --require-pragma
options.description: Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment in order for it to be formatted

name: --stdin-filepath
options.description: Path to the file to pretend that stdin comes from

name: --support-info
options.description: Print support information as JSON

name: -v
--version
options.description: Print Prettier version

name: --debug-check
options.description: This will cause Prettier to print an error message if it detects that code correctness might have changed

name: --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
options.description: Prevent errors when pattern is unmatched
